diff:
--- src/domain/context.rs
+++ replace && with || in Context::is_empty
@@ -53,11 +53,11 @@
     /// Whether the extractor found any meaningful context data.
     #[must_use]
     pub fn is_empty(&self) -> bool {
         self.cwd.is_none()
             && self.title.is_none()
             && self.files_mentioned.is_empty()
             && self.key_decisions.is_empty()
             && self.key_symbols.is_empty()
-            && self.environment_notes.is_empty()
+            || /* ~ changed by cargo-mutants ~ */ self.environment_notes.is_empty()
     }
 }

--- src/domain/context.rs
+++ replace && with || in Context::is_empty
@@ -52,12 +52,12 @@
 
     /// Whether the extractor found any meaningful context data.
     #[must_use]
     pub fn is_empty(&self) -> bool {
         self.cwd.is_none()
             && self.title.is_none()
             && self.files_mentioned.is_empty()
             && self.key_decisions.is_empty()
-            && self.key_symbols.is_empty()
+            || /* ~ changed by cargo-mutants ~ */ self.key_symbols.is_empty()
             && self.environment_notes.is_empty()
     }
 }
